hero.headline: The Essence of Morocco
hero.subheadline: Natural, handcrafted beauty care inspired by Morocco's rich heritage. Argan, Orange Blossom, Nila.

featured.title: Our Products
featured.subtitle: A premium skincare collection, formulated with the finest ingredients from Morocco.

ingredients.title: Our Ingredients
ingredients.subtitle: Straight from the heart of Morocco.

argan.name: Pure Argan
argan.desc: Cold-pressed at Berber cooperatives in the Atlas mountains. Rich in vitamin E and essential fatty acids.

orange.name: Orange Blossom
orange.desc: Steam-distilled. Soothing, regenerating, with a delicate floral fragrance.

nila.name: Nila
nila.desc: A natural blue pigment used for centuries in North African skincare. Purifying and detoxifying.

cta_banner.title: Ready to order?
cta_banner.subtitle: Contact us directly on WhatsApp or Instagram.

products.title: Our Collection
products.subtitle: Three essential skincare products, one philosophy: natural Moroccan beauty.

argan.name: Argan Oil
argan.description: Our pure Argan Oil is cold-pressed from carefully selected argan kernels. Perfect for nourishing skin, enhancing hair, and strengthening nails. Non-greasy and fast-absorbing.
argan.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order the Barbaria Morocco Argan Oil.

savon.name: Black Soap
savon.description: Traditional Moroccan black soap enriched with Orange Blossom and Nila. A natural exfoliant that deeply purifies, brightens your complexion, and prepares skin for treatment. Bring the hammam ritual home.
savon.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order the Barbaria Morocco Black Soap.

scrub.name: Sugar Body Scrub
scrub.description: Our sugar body scrub combines the gentle exfoliating power of sugar with the nourishing benefits of Argan oil, the floral softness of Orange Blossom, and the purity of Nila. Smooth, soft, glowing skin.
scrub.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order the Barbaria Morocco Sugar Body Scrub.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Barbaria Morocco
about.story_1: Born in the heart of Morocco, Barbaria Morocco is a natural cosmetics brand built on a deep conviction: the best beauty care is what nature has already created.
about.story_2: We work directly with Berber cooperatives and local artisans to select the purest ingredients: cold-pressed Argan Oil, traditional Black Soap, steam-distilled Orange Blossom.
about.story_3: Every Barbaria Morocco product is formulated without harsh chemicals or endocrine disruptors, and packaged responsibly. Natural beauty is our heritage.

natural.title: Natural
natural.desc: 100% natural origin ingredients, free from parabens and sulfates.

artisanal.title: Artisanal
artisanal.desc: Handmade by Moroccan craftspeople following traditional recipes.

moroccan.title: Moroccan
moroccan.desc: Rooted in Morocco's beauty heritage, from the Sahara to the Atlas mountains.
